observations: Overall layout structure matches Figma: dark rounded container with header, progress bar, navigation, and carousel cards
Two-column header layout with heading on left and description on right matches Figma proportions
Gradient progress bar and circular navigation buttons positioned correctly
Three cards visible at desktop width with accent-colored backgrounds and rounded corners
Cards are equal height with video button pinned to bottom -- this was the primary goal of the edit and is visually confirmed

layout.detail: Dark container with rounded corners, two-column header, progress bar row, and 3-column card layout all match Figma structure

typography.detail: Heading uses Anton font at large display size (~48px), matching Figma. Card names use Anton at ~40px desktop. Program names use text-header-5 utility which applies Anton font at 24px. Quote text is italic body text at 16px. 'WATCH THE VIDEO' button is uppercase medium weight at 16px. All match Figma specifications.

spacing.detail: Card internal padding visually matches Figma's 24px. Gap between card elements (name, program, quote) appears consistent with Figma's 24px gap. Content area bottom padding matches Figma's 32px.

colors.detail: Card accent background (#b2eae7 / accent token) matches Figma. Dark container background matches #1e1e1c (charcoal). Text colors (charcoal on cards, white on dark bg) match. Progress bar gradient (green-to-cyan) matches Figma.

borderRadius.detail: Container uses rounded-3xl (24px) vs Figma 25px -- 1px difference within tolerance. Cards also use rounded-3xl matching the container style.

alignment.detail: Navigation buttons right-aligned in the progress bar row. Cards left-aligned in the carousel. Header columns properly distributed.

equalHeight.detail: Cards visually appear equal height across all block instances. In the 'Student Testimonials' section (3 visible cards with varying content lengths), all cards stretch to the same height. The 'WATCH THE VIDEO' button is pinned to the bottom of each card that has a video. This confirms the self-start removal fix is working correctly.

layout.detail: 3-column card layout maintained. Header section adapts properly. Progress bar and navigation visible.

equalHeight.detail: Cards remain equal height at tablet width. Video buttons still pinned to bottom.

layout.detail: Cards transition to 2-column layout at this width. Header section stacks or reduces. Progress bar and navigation remain functional and visible.

equalHeight.detail: Cards remain equal height in 2-column layout. Video buttons pinned to bottom.

layout.detail: Single card visible at mobile width. Header stacks vertically. Progress bar and navigation visible. Card fills available width.

typography.detail: Card name uses smaller mobile size (24px/1.5rem). Program and quote text remain readable.

equalHeightCards.detail: The removal of self-start from swiper-slide successfully enables equal-height cards. Visually confirmed across all 6 block instances on the test page at all breakpoints. Cards with and without video buttons both stretch to fill available height, with the video button consistently pinned to the bottom.

closeButtonRestyle.detail: Cannot visually verify modal close button styling from static screenshots since the modal is hidden by default. Code inspection confirms carousel-nav-btn class is applied with proper positioning (-top-5 -right-5 md:-top-6 md:-right-6). The .testimonial-video-close class is preserved for JS compatibility. This is an interactive element that requires manual testing to fully verify.

notes.detail: Figma design shows a gradient fade overlay on the right edge of the carousel (node I785:34805;634:40810) that fades the partially visible 4th card. The implementation clips the overflow instead. This is a pre-existing design gap, not introduced by this edit. It is cosmetic and does not affect functionality.
notes.recommendation: Consider adding a right-edge fade gradient in a future iteration for visual polish matching Figma exactly.

notes.detail: Figma specifies 25px border-radius. Implementation uses rounded-3xl (24px). 1px difference is well within relaxed tolerance.

output.summary: The two changes from the planning spec are visually confirmed: (1) Cards are now equal height with the video button pinned to the bottom across all breakpoints and all 6 test page instances. (2) Close button restyled with carousel-nav-btn class (code-verified; interactive testing needed for full visual confirmation). Overall composition, typography, spacing, colors, and layout all match the Figma design within relaxed tolerance. No issues found. Two minor notes logged for reference (pre-existing right-edge fade and 1px border-radius difference).
